form.formComment: Resumes after a break of six-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw September 27 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Dawn Embers with 60.5kg at $3.30. Previously first up; third of 9 at Ipswich 3yo Mdn-Sw May 10 over 800m, soft track; 4 len behind Cabaletto carrying 58kg at $19. This is an ideal race to kick off. Placed 2/2 fresh and expected to make a bright return.
